title: Highway Direction
description: Help players build Nether roads by guiding them to the nearest highway (North, South, East, or West) with a simple /highway command.
body:
# Highway Direction

A small plugin to help players build their personal Nether tunnels from their portal to the most direct Nether highway (North, East, South, or West) with a simple /highway command.

## Permissions
`highwaydirection.use` Allows a player to use the /highway command to find the nearest highway in the Nether.

## Default configuration

```yaml
---
center:
x: 0
y: 0
```

## Credits
- Originaly made for the [Vloedje SMP](https://vloedje.nl/bijbel)
